testcase.name: test_book_inventory_api
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_decimal_precision.py:135: in test_book_inventory_api assert response.status_code == 200, f"API failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: API failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_decimal_precision.py:152: in test_analytics_movement_api assert response.status_code == 200, f"API failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: API failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_stats_api

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing total_items in stats assert 'total_items' in {'total_opening_stock': 343, 'total_parties': 1, 'total_purchases': 0, 'total_sales': 0, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_decimal_precision.py:164: in test_stats_api assert 'total_items' in data, "Missing total_items in stats" E AssertionError: Missing total_items in stats E assert 'total_items' in {'total_opening_stock': 343, 'total_parties': 1, 'total_purchases': 0, 'total_sales': 0, ...}
